creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Florian Walpen from comment #6)
"If you're not sure about it, I strongly suggest to follow what other python ports do. For e.g. graphlib backport see net/py-errbot or devel/py-strawberry-graphql, it's the same as proposed in my patch."
Okay, it's a good example, you convinced me.
